name: @replyke/monorepo
author: Replyke, maintained by Yanay Tsabary
description: Replyke: Build interactive apps with social features like comments, votes, feeds, user lists, notifications, and more.

scripts.build-all: pnpm --filter @replyke/core run build && pnpm --filter @replyke/react-js run build && pnpm --filter @replyke/react-native run build && pnpm --filter @replyke/expo run build
scripts.publish-prod:patch: pnpm version:patch && pnpm build-all && pnpm publish-prod
scripts.publish-prod:minor: pnpm version:minor && pnpm build-all && pnpm publish-prod
scripts.publish-beta:patch: pnpm version:patch && pnpm build-all && pnpm publish-beta
scripts.publish-beta:minor: pnpm version:minor && pnpm build-all && pnpm publish-beta
